title: COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: LIFE COUNSELING COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services including individual counseling, couples counseling, adolescent therapy, family therapy, play therapy, group therapy, and immigration assessments. 851 NE Baker Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5:30pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (503) 435-4840 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 435-4840 Main phone Main phone (503) 435-4840 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP through Yamhill County (YCCO) and offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Insurance information or proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation * Immigration Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFE COUNSELING
